title: The lads on tour
description:
Small pack for a group of mates, trying to keep the content fresh and exciting, in doing this the journey takes the play through an updated world, new terrains, foods, building items and brand new weapons.

In an ever evolving pack no day is the same.
body:
A modpack built for a few mates after realising playing the same old vanilla minecraft was starting to get repetitive.
This pack allows the same vanilla feel whilst adding some enjoyable aspects such as huge selections of new building blocks through the use of **Macaws**, new foods through **FD2** and new places to explore through the use of **Terralith** and **Structory**.
